description_long: This object consists of two pillar candles, one of which is placed on a wide, flat, circular metal tray with a looped handle, while the other stands alone. The main candle is tall and cylindrical, with a visible wick at the top and a slightly textured, off-white wax surface. The tray is metallic, matte, and has a simple, utilitarian design with a thin, wire-like handle extending from one side. The secondary candle is shorter, also cylindrical, and appears to be made of the same wax material, with a visible wick and a slightly uneven top surface. Both candles show subtle surface imperfections typical of hand-poured wax, but no visible wax drips. The overall appearance suggests a functional yet decorative item, suitable for use in urban outdoor or indoor settings such as patios, sidewalks, or entryways.
description: A set of two off-white pillar candles, one on a round metal tray with a looped handle and one standing alone, both with visible wicks and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Shows both candles, with the taller candle on a metal tray with a handle and the shorter candle standing separately to the left.
description_view_1: Front view of the main candle centered on the tray, handle not visible, and the shorter candle is not in view.
description_view_2: Rear angle showing the tray's handle extending to the left and both candles visible, with the shorter candle now on the right.
description_view_3: Direct view of the main candle on the tray, with the shorter candle positioned in front and the handle not visible.
attribute_holder_type: matte metal tray with looped handle
